customerCareDesc: Welcome to Rakshapeeth's Customer Care page. Find solutions to common questions and get instant assistance.
faq1q: How do I register on the website?
faq1a: To register, visit the Register page and fill in the required details. Once submitted, your account will be verified and activated. If you face issues, ensure you have a stable internet connection or contact Customer Care.
faq2q: How do I log in if I'm facing issues?
faq2a: Use the Login page with your registered credentials. If login fails, double-check your username and password, or use the 'Forgot Password' option. Persistent issues may be due to cache or network problems.
faq3q: How do I fill out the Pre-Visit Form, and what should I do if it doesn't work?
faq3a: The Pre-Visit Form is on both the Visitor and Parent pages. Fill all details and submit. If it doesn’t load, it may be a network issue — please contact Customer Care.
faq4q: What should I do if there's a problem with the iris scan or number plate scanning system?
faq4a: Check that the scanning device is clean, connected, and aligned. If issues persist, contact Technical Support via Customer Care.
faq5q: How can I send an alert to the admin?
faq5a: Authorized users can send alerts to the admin from their dashboard. If your alert isn’t sending, verify your connection and contact support.
faq6q: What should I do if there's an issue with the parent notification system?
faq6a: If parents aren't receiving notifications, verify their contact info and your connection. If the issue continues, report it via Customer Care.
faq7q: Who are authorized users, and what are their responsibilities?
faq7a: Authorized users include admin, parents, and daily visitors. They must protect their credentials and report suspicious activity.
faq8q: How can I view expected visitors?
faq8a: Guards and authorized staff can view expected visitors under the 'View Visitors' option in the Guard Page sidebar.

aboutPara1: Rakshapeeth is an advanced automated gate security system designed specifically for universities and educational institutions. Our goal is to redefine campus safety by combining cutting-edge technology with intelligent automation — ensuring a secure, efficient, and transparent access management experience for students, staff, and visitors.
aboutPara2: For students, Rakshapeeth offers a dual-layer verification system that combines iris recognition with student ID scanning. This ensures that every individual entering the campus is verified beyond doubt, creating a reliable and tamper-proof layer of protection for the institution.
aboutPara3: When it comes to visitors, Rakshapeeth provides a truly smart experience. Its number plate recognition system automatically scans and validates incoming vehicles, while unregistered guests can still be logged manually for security tracking. Visitors can also submit pre-visit requests, making entry more convenient and organized. If a blacklisted user or vehicle is detected, Rakshapeeth immediately triggers an alert to security personnel, ensuring that potential threats are addressed instantly and effectively.
aboutPara4: Safety goes beyond the gate. With Rakshapeeth's real-time parent notification system, parents receive instant alerts whenever their child enters or exits the campus. This promotes peace of mind, transparency, and trust between families and institutions.
aboutPara5: At its core, Rakshapeeth is more than a security system — it's a vision for safer campuses through innovation. By merging advanced verification, intelligent monitoring, and real-time communication, Rakshapeeth empowers universities to create a secure and connected environment where safety is effortless, reliable, and future-ready.

notifyPara1: AGSS-BV’s Smart Notification system by Rakshapeeth ensures that parents and administrators are always connected to the campus in real time.
notifyPara2: This intelligent alert system is powered by seamless integration with the secure biometric and ID verification process at the gate.
notifyPara3: Beyond safety, this real-time communication empowers campus administrators to monitor student movements efficiently.
securePara1: At Banasthali Vidyapith, the Automated Gate Security System (AGSS-BV) ensures a safe, seamless, and futuristic entry experience.
securePara2: When a student approaches, their ID card is instantly scanned to retrieve their profile from our secure database.
securePara3: Next, a state-of-the-art iris scan is performed, adding a second layer of ultra-secure verification.
securePara4: This dual-layer authentication system ensures fast, contactless, and reliable access while maintaining strict control.
securePara5: Watch the video to see the verification process, automatic gate opening, and real-time notifications to parents.
vehiclePara1: AGSS-BV’s Vehicle Management system, powered by Rakshapeeth, brings intelligent automated control to campus vehicle access.
vehiclePara2: Whitelisted Vehicles – Permanent campus vehicles belonging to staff, faculty, or registered students are instantly recognized and allowed entry.
vehiclePara3: Occasional Visitors – Vehicles from parents, guests, or vendors who have pre-registered are automatically verified for access.
vehiclePara4: Blacklisted Vehicles – Vehicles flagged for security concerns are immediately denied entry and security personnel are alerted.
vehiclePara5: Unregistered Vehicles – Vehicles not found in the database trigger a secure manual approval process.
vehiclePara6: This system ensures that every vehicle entering the campus is accurately monitored and recorded, enhancing security and efficiency.
footerDescription: Automated Gate Security System for Banasthali Vidyapith.
